Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven D. Martini, Esq. of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / moving party Quintec Industries, Inc.

RULING:
Defendant Quintec Industries Inc.'s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is granted. No opposition filed. The complaint was filed in 1994, over 5 years ago. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
